what_happened: Added Docker build provenance attestation and digest capture to GitHub Actions workflow
why: buildx provenance and SBOM attestation require both `attestations: write` and `id-token: write` permissions on the job
fix_applied: Added `attestations: write` alongside the existing `id-token: write` in job permissions; added `provenance: true` and `sbom: true` to docker/build-push-action; referenced step output via `steps.build.outputs.digest`
pattern_to_remember: GitHub Actions: docker/build-push-action provenance/SBOM requires `attestations: write` + `id-token: write` job permissions. The step needs `id: build` to expose `outputs.digest`. Capture digest with `echo "${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}" > digest.txt` then upload with actions/upload-artifact.
